expectations.name: skill_invoked
expectations.evidence: Transcript begins with 'I'm using the fitness-functions skill to verify architecture compliance.' References SKILL.md requirements and fitness-agent-prompt.md escalation protocol.

expectations.name: vagueness_detected
expectations.text: Agent identifies that architecture characteristics lack concrete, measurable goals
expectations.evidence: Each characteristic analyzed individually: Security ('Should be secure' — 'Concrete goal? NO'), Performance ('Must be fast' — 'has no measurable definition'), Maintainability ('subjective'), Scalability ('undefined'). All four flagged as lacking concrete goals.

expectations.name: no_invented_thresholds
expectations.text: Agent does NOT invent arbitrary thresholds (like picking 80% coverage without it being specified)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states: 'I am NOT creating any fitness functions, because doing so would require inventing thresholds that have no basis in the project's architectural decisions.' No arbitrary numbers chosen.

expectations.name: asks_or_escalates
expectations.text: Agent asks for clarification or escalates with NEEDS_CONTEXT/BLOCKED status
expectations.evidence: Status: NEEDS_CONTEXT. Provides concrete examples of what each characteristic would need. Recommends architecture-assessment skill to revise architecture.md.

expectations.name: no_broken_functions
expectations.text: Agent does NOT create fitness functions with made-up pass criteria
expectations.evidence: Zero fitness functions created. 'thresholds without architectural decision-making are arbitrary numbers, not goals.'
